yesterdayAnalysis: Tuesday's training executed perfectly with a 4.1mi run at Carlsbad (TSS 43, HR 146) and 1.7mi pool swim (TSS 28, HR 116), totaling 71 TSS. The run HR of 146 is well-controlled for aerobic work, and completing both disciplines on the same day adds 71 TSS to the week. Sleep recovery bounced back nicely with an 82 score after the challenging 46 score on 6/15.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's scheduled 50min bike + 20min brick run as planned — this is your second brick of the week and a key TSS contributor. Keep bike effort conversational and the brick run truly easy to protect the hip while building neuromuscular adaptation for race day transitions.
weekProgress: Week 9 of 10: Currently at 166 TSS of 320 target (52%) with 4 days remaining including today. This is exactly on track for a back-loaded Transition week — Saturday's 50-55mi long ride and today's brick are the heavy TSS sessions. Two bricks already completed (Mon/today), swim discipline engaged, and the step-down volume is being executed properly.
keyInsight: Sleep quality has rebounded strongly (81-82 scores last two nights) after the mid-week dip, positioning you well for today's brick and the approaching Saturday long ride in this reduced-volume Transition week.
positives: Sleep recovery strong: 81-82 scores last two nights with RHR stable at 55bpm
